name: Lots o' Apple Cake - the Pillsbury Cookbook
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Apples; peeled & sliced thin (approximately 5 apples)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour the bottom only of a 13x9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except nuts at low speed until moistened; beat for 2 minutes at medium speed.
4. Stir in nuts.
5. Pour batter into prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Serve warm or cool with whipped cream, ice cream, butter sauce, or caramel sauce, if desired.
